nodes.label: Hypermail MCP
nodes.rationale: Unified email MCP server — operate any inbox (Outlook, IMAP, Gmail) by passing an email address. The core product.

nodes.label: Justificatif Monday Email
nodes.rationale: Receives hypermail-mcp EmailFull JSON via webhook and creates a monday.com board row with sender/subject/date metadata.

nodes.label: Dokploy Deployment
nodes.rationale: Dockerfile-only deployment to Dokploy — no compose file. Everything configured in Dokploy UI with persistent storage mounts.

nodes.label: EmailProvider Interface
nodes.rationale: Core abstraction that all email backends (Outlook, IMAP, Gmail) implement. Defines listEmails, readEmail, sendEmail, etc.

nodes.label: Outlook Provider
nodes.rationale: Microsoft Graph API provider using msal-node device-code OAuth flow.

nodes.label: IMAP Provider
nodes.rationale: Generic IMAP provider using imapflow + nodemailer.

nodes.label: Gmail Provider
nodes.rationale: Gmail API provider using googleapis with device-code OAuth.

nodes.label: Provider Registry
nodes.rationale: Routes account email → provider. Instantiates all three providers at startup with their respective configs.

nodes.label: Account Store
nodes.rationale: AES-256-GCM encrypted multi-account persistence. Stores OAuth tokens, provider type, and lastSeenIds for dedup.

nodes.label: Crypto Module
nodes.rationale: AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt with key resolution (env var, file, or auto-generated master.key). Atomic writes prevent corruption.

nodes.label: Webhook Delivery
nodes.rationale: HTTP POST with exponential backoff retry (baseDelay × 2^attempt). Posts EmailFull JSON to configured URL.

nodes.label: MCP Server
nodes.rationale: MCP server setup supporting both stdio and HTTP transports with session management.

nodes.label: Tool Registration
nodes.rationale: Central tool registration hub — delegates to accounts, browse, folders, organize, compose submodules.

nodes.label: On-Email Handler
nodes.rationale: Receives EmailFull JSON on stdin, creates monday.com board row via GraphQL mutation with sender/subject/date columns.

nodes.label: Monday.com Integration
nodes.rationale: GraphQL v2 API to monday.com — creates items on a board with configurable column mappings for sender, email, subject, date.

nodes.label: Device Code Auth
nodes.rationale: OAuth device-code flow — user visits URL and enters code, server polls for token. Used by both Outlook and Gmail.

nodes.label: Read-Only Mode
nodes.rationale: Tools like send_email, archive_email, trash_email, move_email are disabled under --read-only flag for safe assistant surfaces.

nodes.label: Email Watch System
nodes.rationale: Background poll loop scanning inboxes for new messages, POSTing to webhook URL. Intended for push-based email triage — downstream agents receive full email content without polling.

nodes.label: Persistent Storage
nodes.rationale: Bind mount ../files/data → /data persists encrypted OAuth tokens and lastSeenIds across redeploys.

nodes.label: HTTP Transport
nodes.rationale: Hosted HTTP server mode for MCP — alternative to stdio, enables remote clients.

nodes.label: CLI Entry Point
nodes.rationale: Argument parsing and entry point — supports --http, --stdio, --read-only, --host, --port flags.

nodes.label: Tool Filtering
nodes.rationale: tools.enabled allowlist / tools.disabled blocklist — lets operators ship minimal agent-facing surfaces.

nodes.label: Inline Images Handler
nodes.rationale: Shared utility for extracting and converting inline images across providers.

nodes.label: HTML/Markdown Converter
nodes.rationale: Bidirectional conversion between HTML and Markdown for email body formatting.

nodes.label: Browse Tools
nodes.rationale: list_emails, search_emails, read_email, read_attachment — read operations across providers.

nodes.label: Compose Tools
nodes.rationale: send_email, draft_email, edit_draft, send_draft, add_attachment — write operations with format conversion.

nodes.label: Account Tools
nodes.rationale: list_accounts, add_account, complete_add_account, remove_account, get/set_account_settings.

nodes.label: Folder Tools
nodes.rationale: list_folders, create_folder, delete_folder, rename_folder — folder management across providers.

nodes.label: Organize Tools
nodes.rationale: archive_email, trash_email, move_email, mark_read, mark_unread — email lifecycle operations.

nodes.label: Docker Deployment
nodes.rationale: node:20-slim based Docker image with npm global install, exposes port 3000 for HTTP mode.

nodes.label: Hypermail Config JSON
nodes.rationale: JSON config file with http, dataDir, tools, providers, watch sections. Resolved at startup with ${VAR} expansion.

nodes.label: NPM Publish Workflow
nodes.rationale: Bump version, build, test, publish to npm registry workflow.
